# Total Coloring Lean

> A Lean 4 formalization of an auxiliary rainbow edge-coloring problem used in total-coloring research. The library proves that every finite formal `InAuxiliaryClass D H J` has a proper rainbow auxiliary edge coloring with palette `Fin (D + 2)`. Given that same `InAuxiliaryClass D H J` hypothesis, a supplied compatible `Auxiliary.Extension G H`, and selector membership in `distinguishedEdgeSet H J`, it also obtains a valid total assignment on `G`. This is not an end-to-end high-degree theorem or a proof of the Total Coloring Conjecture.

Treat commit `a441fbfa1e404dc7610e0c32c80dd692cd938c20` as authoritative for the supplied equitable-partition adapter, commit `343b7b87b82532a9d8eade6d4cd43679eae1f7c9` for the public numerical layer, commit `7aa102b0211c36c6d69f03bc051a5c2706f62c9d` for the qualitative supplied-witness structure, commit `dc2a318be1dd1475b90c492ad460c4180a3fbdec` for the original extension seam, commit `9bdcdec1a872ccef42cfd79e791fe39c22a1beeb` for the conditional transfer, and commit `310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b` for the all-orders auxiliary source. Given `P : PairSingletonWitness G`, Lean constructs `P.auxiliaryGraph` and `P.extension`, proves the matching-plus-full-star structure, and derives exact degree/count identities. Given `Q : EquitableIndependentPartition G D` with `D <= Fintype.card V < 2 * D`, Lean constructs `Q.toPairSingletonWitness` and proves its distinguished family has cardinality `D`. On a nonempty graph, `Q.exists_valid_assignment_of_highDegreePartition` takes an explicit `Q : EquitableIndependentPartition G (G.maxDegree + 1)` and `Fintype.card V <= 2 * G.maxDegree`, then proves existence of a valid total assignment with `ExtensionPalette (G.maxDegree + 1)`, hence `G.maxDegree + 3` colors. Lean does not yet prove existence of `Q` for every target graph; complement matching is only a prospective route, and the empty graph is separate. Thus the `Delta + 3` result is conditional, not end-to-end, and no `Delta + 2` result is proved. Release v0.1.0 predates these layers.

Distribution state at this revision: `main` contains the conditional transfer through merge commit `76cd929d13168485ef4b9b43b5e684ab9687d87d`; draft PR #8 contains the later supplied-witness and partition-adapter layers.

Numerical provenance remains split exactly: private verification source commit `acb08de85f99c7db578e042e67d3f172c5599fcd`, tree `7207e2a282ff829fba9737e93154f46f385ef879`, source-archive SHA-256 `5c3bef3720abeb62d0c437fbc638fe1848059892fbe09fe0c437c942c16baf5c`; identical numerical Lean content at public integration commit `343b7b87b82532a9d8eade6d4cd43679eae1f7c9`, tree `9863f500b2671048f4dc386f497eb6523b065099`. Jobs `5387926`, `5387929`, `5387933`, and `5387978` passed; GitHub Lean CI `29612994477` and docs `29612994502` succeeded. Diagnostic jobs `5387930` and `5387932` are not receipts or proof failures.

The adapter is commit `a441fbfa1e404dc7610e0c32c80dd692cd938c20`, exact tree `0e9b04a2acabae0cb0612e5e3cbf0344cc2f94f7`, source-archive SHA-256 `736db25ca7d25fb0eed8431e435e80bc94287e1ae88f9dea806ddba2c1b544f4`, and outgoing-cache SHA-256 `94456901604a3b6ecde49368a4ba285fda03ecdca856b0c37f207624527e037a`. Adapter leaf `5387980`, Nova full build `5387981`, and high-memory full/Quickstart/leanchecker trust `5387982` all completed with exit `0:0`. PR #8 remains draft.

## Essential

- [Machine-readable claim boundary](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/main/docs/claim-boundary.json): Exact declaration, scope, palette, exclusions, and trust facts.
- [Exact proof status](https://chenle02.github.io/total-coloring-lean/proof-status/): Human-readable checked result and non-results.
- [Curated theorem index](https://chenle02.github.io/total-coloring-lean/theorem-index/): High-value public declarations and their roles.
- [Guide for coding agents](https://chenle02.github.io/total-coloring-lean/for-agents/): Authority order, safe prompts, and claim-audit rules.
- [Repository contract](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/main/AGENTS.md): Mandatory rules for modifications.

## Source

- [Umbrella import](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/a441fbfa1e404dc7610e0c32c80dd692cd938c20/TotalColoring.lean): Direct imports for the complete adapter-layer library.
- [Terminal theorem module](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/CriticalAllDClosure.lean): Critical contradiction and finite extraction theorem.
- [Conditional transfer](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/9bdcdec1a872ccef42cfd79e791fe39c22a1beeb/TotalColoring/AuxiliaryTransfer.lean): Composition with a supplied extension and explicit selector membership.
- [Supplied pair/singleton extension](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/pull/8): Concrete auxiliary graph, conflict-preserving extension, exact selector coverage, matching-plus-full-star structure, exact degree/class-count identities, and conditional high-degree `IsAuxiliaryClassMember`.
- [Supplied equitable-partition adapter](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/a441fbfa1e404dc7610e0c32c80dd692cd938c20/TotalColoring/EquitablePairSingleton.lean): Constructs the pair/singleton witness and exact `J.card = D` from a supplied equitable independent partition, then proves the conditional high-degree `Delta + 3` total-assignment theorem; partition existence and the empty graph remain open.
- [Auxiliary class](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/AuxiliaryClass.lean): Definition of `InAuxiliaryClass`.
- [Conditional decoder](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/Auxiliary.lean): Structural extension interface and total-assignment decoder.
- [Semantic coloring predicates](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/Total.lean): Total- and edge-coloring assignments.
- [Certificate checkers](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/310b82c174ab2281581900897d4646875575e89b/TotalColoring/Certificate.lean): Executable Boolean checkers and soundness theorems.

## Optional

- [Getting started](https://chenle02.github.io/total-coloring-lean/getting-started/): Reproducible setup and build commands.
- [Proof architecture](https://chenle02.github.io/total-coloring-lean/architecture/): Module-level route through the formal proof.
- [Trust and reproduction](https://chenle02.github.io/total-coloring-lean/trust/): Kernel, checker, parser, and CI boundaries.
- [Compiled Quickstart](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/docs/examples/Quickstart.lean): Copyable public declarations checked by CI.
- [Contributing](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution workflow.
- [Citation metadata](https://github.com/chenle02/total-coloring-lean/blob/main/CITATION.cff): Software citation record.
